pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-T-008 (AI Governance/Task) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.583, highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.583). Core signal: 0, OOS signals: 0, seniority: appropriate. AI Governance at this signal level does not meet inclusion threshold for AI/ML Specialist (DoD).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.583, and AI Governance (AG) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI Governance KSA (composite 0.583)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis does not surface this AI Governance competency as a standard AI/ML Specialist (DoD) requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
